headings: In Case of Structural Failure, Explosion or Terrorist Event
text: It is difficult to establish a complete plan for this type of event. It may be possible that workers may have to act on their own and do their best to protect themselves and those workers around them. After it is safe to move, report to Muster Point #1 or #2 whichever is available. At this time the situation will be assessed, and further instructions will be given.
